---
title: "Tableau and Slack Integration"
description: "This talk will showcase how to improve communication efficiency through the integration of two powerful business tools: Slack and Tableau."
author: "Flavio Matos"
date: "January 22, 2025"
categories: [Tableau, Slack]
event: "TUG Brazil, Online"
image: cover_image.png
format: html
---

## About this event

In this session, I demonstrate how to connect **Tableau Server** to a **Slack workspace** to streamline communication and data collaboration.

I share practical examples of how to:

**- Automate Updates**: Deliver regular dashboard snapshots directly to Slack channels, replacing traditional email reports.

**- Real-time Monitoring**: Configure automatic Slack alerts to track specific metrics instantly.

**- Drive Efficiency**: Ensure your team has fast, integrated access to relevant data for quicker decision-making.

Join us to transform how you and your team work with data!

**Please note:** This event will be conducted in **Portuguese**.

### Recording

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9WalQPD_ETE >}}
